callGraph.callee:
(
        await db.execute(
            select(
                WarehouseLayoutVersion,
                WarehouseAisle,
                WarehouseRack,
                WarehouseShelf,
                WarehouseBin,
            )
            .join(WarehouseAisle, WarehouseAisle.layout_version_id == WarehouseLayoutVersion.id)
            .join(WarehouseRack, WarehouseRack.aisle_id == WarehouseAisle.id)
            .join(WarehouseShelf, WarehouseShelf.rack_id == WarehouseRack.id)
            .join(WarehouseBin, WarehouseBin.shelf_id == WarehouseShelf.id)
            .where(*clauses)
        )
    ).one_or_none

select(
                WarehouseLayoutVersion,
                WarehouseAisle,
                WarehouseRack,
                WarehouseShelf,
                WarehouseBin,
            )
            .join(WarehouseAisle, WarehouseAisle.layout_version_id == WarehouseLayoutVersion.id)
            .join(WarehouseRack, WarehouseRack.aisle_id == WarehouseAisle.id)
            .join(WarehouseShelf, WarehouseShelf.rack_id == WarehouseRack.id)
            .join(WarehouseBin, WarehouseBin.shelf_id == WarehouseShelf.id)
            .where

select(
                WarehouseLayoutVersion,
                WarehouseAisle,
                WarehouseRack,
                WarehouseShelf,
                WarehouseBin,
            )
            .join(WarehouseAisle, WarehouseAisle.layout_version_id == WarehouseLayoutVersion.id)
            .join(WarehouseRack, WarehouseRack.aisle_id == WarehouseAisle.id)
            .join(WarehouseShelf, WarehouseShelf.rack_id == WarehouseRack.id)
            .join

select(
                WarehouseLayoutVersion,
                WarehouseAisle,
                WarehouseRack,
                WarehouseShelf,
                WarehouseBin,
            )
            .join(WarehouseAisle, WarehouseAisle.layout_version_id == WarehouseLayoutVersion.id)
            .join(WarehouseRack, WarehouseRack.aisle_id == WarehouseAisle.id)
            .join

select(
                WarehouseLayoutVersion,
                WarehouseAisle,
                WarehouseRack,
                WarehouseShelf,
                WarehouseBin,
            )
            .join(WarehouseAisle, WarehouseAisle.layout_version_id == WarehouseLayoutVersion.id)
            .join

select(
                WarehouseLayoutVersion,
                WarehouseAisle,
                WarehouseRack,
                WarehouseShelf,
                WarehouseBin,
            )
            .join

(
            await db.execute(
                select(WarehouseAisle, WarehouseRack, WarehouseShelf, WarehouseBin)
                .join(WarehouseRack, WarehouseRack.aisle_id == WarehouseAisle.id)
                .join(WarehouseShelf, WarehouseShelf.rack_id == WarehouseRack.id)
                .join(WarehouseBin, WarehouseBin.shelf_id == WarehouseShelf.id)
                .where(
                    WarehouseAisle.layout_version_id == current.id,
                    WarehouseBin.provenance_status.in_(("manual", "confirmed")),
                )
            )
        ).all

select(WarehouseAisle, WarehouseRack, WarehouseShelf, WarehouseBin)
                .join(WarehouseRack, WarehouseRack.aisle_id == WarehouseAisle.id)
                .join(WarehouseShelf, WarehouseShelf.rack_id == WarehouseRack.id)
                .join(WarehouseBin, WarehouseBin.shelf_id == WarehouseShelf.id)
                .where

select(WarehouseAisle, WarehouseRack, WarehouseShelf, WarehouseBin)
                .join(WarehouseRack, WarehouseRack.aisle_id == WarehouseAisle.id)
                .join(WarehouseShelf, WarehouseShelf.rack_id == WarehouseRack.id)
                .join

select(WarehouseAisle, WarehouseRack, WarehouseShelf, WarehouseBin)
                .join(WarehouseRack, WarehouseRack.aisle_id == WarehouseAisle.id)
                .join
(result.stderr or result.stdout or "ros2 topic pub failed").strip

(
        await db.execute(
            select(WarehouseCoordinateFrame)
            .where(
                WarehouseCoordinateFrame.warehouse_map_id == warehouse_map_id,
                WarehouseCoordinateFrame.status == "locked",
            )
            .order_by(WarehouseCoordinateFrame.version.desc())
            .limit(1)
        )
    ).scalar_one_or_none
